description: Test prompts cho Documentation Skills Toolkit — dùng để verify skill trigger đúng và output format chuẩn

evals.prompt: Khởi tạo documentation project mới với MkDocs Material
evals.expected_output: mkdocs.yml config đầy đủ, folder structure chuẩn, markdownlint config

evals.prompt: Review và fix markdown quality cho thư mục docs/
evals.expected_output: Markdownlint rules applied, heading hierarchy fixed, code blocks có language

evals.prompt: Thêm admonitions và tabs vào trang documentation hiện có
evals.expected_output: MkDocs-Material components: admonitions, content tabs, đúng syntax

evals.prompt: Viết runbook cho service nginx trên Ubuntu 22.04
evals.expected_output: Markdown file có: YAML header, Health Checks table, Commands với expected output, Escalation matrix

evals.prompt: Document network topology cho môi trường production với 3 VLAN
evals.expected_output: Mermaid diagram, VLAN table, Firewall rules table

evals.prompt: Tạo incident response playbook cho database outage
evals.expected_output: Severity matrix, step-by-step với commands, rollback procedure, escalation contacts

evals.prompt: Hệ thống bị lỗi, cần quy trình xử lý
evals.expected_output: Incident response SOP với severity classification, commands, expected output

evals.prompt: Viết maintenance window plan cho database migration
evals.expected_output: Maintenance window template: pre-checks, steps với commands, post-checks, rollback plan

evals.prompt: Phân tích incident theo failure category — database connection pool exhausted
evals.expected_output: Postmortem với failure category classification (Database/Resource), 5 Whys root cause analysis, SLA impact table, connection pool investigation checklist, prevention controls

evals.prompt: Viết postmortem cho cascading failure khi 1 service down kéo theo cả hệ thống
evals.expected_output: Cascading failure pattern analysis, circuit breaker status review, dependency chain trace, retry storm investigation, bulkhead + graceful degradation recommendations

evals.prompt: Viết training module Git cơ bản cho nhân viên mới
evals.expected_output: Training template: Audience, Duration, Prerequisites, Lessons với hands-on labs, Assessment

evals.prompt: Tạo onboarding checklist cho DevOps engineer mới join team
evals.expected_output: 3-week onboarding checklist: Week 1 Foundation, Week 2 Deep Dive, Week 3 Autonomy

evals.prompt: Thiết kế learning path cho team infrastructure
evals.expected_output: Mermaid diagram learning path: Beginner → Intermediate → Advanced → Expert

evals.prompt: Tạo bài kiểm tra kiến thức cho module Docker basics
evals.expected_output: Knowledge check template with multiple choice + scenario questions + pass criteria

evals.prompt: Thiết kế competency matrix cho team DevOps
evals.expected_output: Competency matrix with 4 levels (Beginner → Expert), skills mapped, assessment criteria

evals.prompt: Viết ADR cho quyết định chọn PostgreSQL thay vì MongoDB
evals.expected_output: ADR template: Status, Context, Decision, Alternatives Considered với pros/cons table, Consequences

evals.prompt: Viết technical spec cho tính năng authentication mới
evals.expected_output: Tech spec: Overview, Design với Architecture Diagram, API Contracts, Implementation Plan, Testing Strategy

evals.prompt: Tạo how-to guide cách setup Google Workspace cho user mới
evals.expected_output: How-to guide: Prerequisites, Steps với commands + expected result, Verify, Troubleshooting

evals.prompt: Làm cheat sheet cho Docker commands thường dùng
evals.expected_output: Quick reference: Essential Commands table, Common Patterns, Glossary

evals.prompt: Viết ADR phức tạp cho quyết định migration từ monolith sang microservices với nhiều options
evals.expected_output: MADR format: Decision Drivers, Considered Options, Pros/Cons per option, Decision Outcome, Confirmation

evals.prompt: Ghi nhận nhanh quyết định chọn library date-fns thay moment.js
evals.expected_output: Lightweight ADR: Problem, Decision, Reason, Impact — concise 1-page format

evals.prompt: Viết security policy cho team infrastructure
evals.expected_output: Security policy template: Policy ID, Scope, Policy Statements, Enforcement table, Review date

evals.prompt: Tạo access control matrix RBAC cho production environment
evals.expected_output: RBAC matrix: Role definitions, Permission matrix (resource x role), Access review schedule

evals.prompt: Định nghĩa audit log standards cho hệ thống
evals.expected_output: Audit log standards: Event categories, JSON log format, Retention policy, Exclusion list

evals.prompt: Review bảo mật trước khi deploy service mới
evals.expected_output: Pre-deploy security checklist: Auth, Network, Data, Monitoring, Dependency sections

evals.prompt: Tạo API reference cho User Management API — CRUD endpoints, Bearer auth, JSON format
evals.expected_output: API reference: endpoint headers, curl request examples, JSON response examples, error codes table, authentication section

evals.prompt: Document GraphQL API cho e-commerce: queries, mutations, subscriptions
evals.expected_output: GraphQL docs: schema overview, query examples with variables, mutation examples, error handling, auth method

evals.prompt: Viết webhook docs cho payment system — event types, payload format, retry policy
evals.expected_output: Webhook docs: event types table, payload JSON example, signature verification, retry policy

evals.prompt: API reference cho internal microservice có OAuth2 + RBAC permissions
evals.expected_output: API reference + security composition: T13 structure, OAuth2 auth flow, RBAC permissions per endpoint
